scripts.test: node -e "await import('@i-remember/memory-engine'); const fs = await import('node:fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); if (!fs.existsSync('src/main.tsx')) process.exit(1); if (!pkg.dependencies['@i-remember/ui']) process.exit(1); console.log('admin app entry ok')"
